# data_manifests/river/

This directory contains the RIVER video manifests and runtime reports.

## File Map

### Source Manifests (generated by `prepare_river_video_manifest.py`)
These are per-dataset slices extracted from the master RIVER manifest.
They tell downstream scripts **which exact videos/clips** are needed.

| File | Rows | Purpose |
|------|------|---------|
| `ego4d_narration_val.jsonl` | 246 | Ego4D-Narration-Val rows |
| `ego_ego4d_narration_val.jsonl` | 655 | Ego-Ego4D-Narration-Val rows |
| `longvideobench.jsonl` | 7 | LongVideoBench rows |
| `lvbench.jsonl` | 82 | LVBench rows |
| `qvhighlights_val.jsonl` | 354 | QVHighlights rows |
| `vript_rr.jsonl` | 2 | Vript-RR rows |

### Download Lists (pure IDs for downloader tools)
| File | Count | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `ego4d_uids.txt` | 745 | Unique Ego4D video UIDs |
| `qvhighlights_clips.jsonl` | 354 | Clip specs: `youtube_id`, `start_sec`, `end_sec` |
| `qvhighlights_youtube_ids.txt` | 251 | Unique YouTube IDs for QVHighlights |
| `lvbench_video_ids.txt` | 82 | LVBench video IDs |
| `longvideobench_video_ids.txt` | 7 | LongVideoBench video IDs |
| `vript_video_ids.txt` | 2 | Vript-RR video IDs |

### Summary & Check Reports
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `summary.json` | Counts and annotation-coverage check (one-time, from prepare) |
| `local_video_check.json` | Local missing-video report (generated by `tools/check_river_videos.py`) |

### Download Runtime Reports (live, do not move while downloading)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `lvbench_download_report.json` | LVBench download progress / failures |
| `longvideobench_download_report.json` | LongVideoBench download progress / failures |
| `qvhighlights_download_report.json` | QVHighlights download progress / failures |

### Archived Reports
| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `reports/missing_report.json` | One-time diagnostic: manifest↔annotation mismatches & duplicates |
